category_sources: Official sccache README at https://github.com/mozilla/sccache describes a compiler cache.
source_facts.description: Used as a compiler wrapper and avoids compilation when possible.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/mozilla/sccache uses sccache.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation entry point.
Official repository docs/Configuration.md provides configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/mozilla/sccache, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official sccache repository README describes compiler cache behavior.
source_facts.description identifies compiler-wrapper behavior that avoids recompilation.
